option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.TilePane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.amateur.MusicfrontController"> <top> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card music-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="24.0" right="24.0" top="24.0" /> </padding> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Découvrir Musique" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Cliquez sur une carte pour écouter la musique" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" onAction="#handleSearch" promptText="Titre, description, genre" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleSearch" text="Rechercher" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleClearSearch" text="Effacer" /> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <Button fx:id="musiqueSectionButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleShowMusiqueSection" text="Musiques" /> <Button fx:id="playlistsSectionButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleShowPlaylistsSection" text="Playlists" /> </HBox> </VBox> </top>
<center> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card music-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="24.0" left="24.0" right="24.0" top="0.0" /> </padding>
<VBox fx:id="musiqueSection" spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Musiques disponibles" /> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" prefHeight="430.0" styleClass="amateur-scroll"> <VBox spacing="12.0"> <TilePane fx:id="musicGrid" hgap="12.0" prefColumns="4" vgap="12.0" /> <Label fx:id="emptyListLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Aucune musique disponible pour le moment." wrapText="true" /> </VBox> </ScrollPane> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="playlistsSection" spacing="10.0" visible="false" managed="false"> <Label text="Mes playlists" />
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <Button fx:id="togglePlaylistFormButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleTogglePlaylistForm" text="Nouvelle playlist" /> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="playlistFormSection" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 12;" visible="false" managed="false"> <Label text="Créer une playlist" /> <TextField fx:id="playlistNameField" promptText="Nom de la playlist" /> <TextArea fx:id="playlistDescriptionArea" prefRowCount="3" promptText="Description (facultative)" wrapText="true" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="playlistImageField" editable="false" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" promptText="Image de couverture" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleChoosePlaylistImage" text="Parcourir" /> </HBox> <Button fx:id="createPlaylistButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleCreatePlaylist" text="Créer la playlist" /> </VBox>
<Label fx:id="playlistFeedbackLabel" wrapText="true" /> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" prefHeight="210.0" styleClass="amateur-scroll"> <content> <TilePane fx:id="playlistGrid" hgap="12.0" prefColumns="3" vgap="12.0" /> </content> </ScrollPane> </VBox> </VBox> </center>
</BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.TilePane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.amateur.MusicfrontController"> <top> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card music-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="24.0" right="24.0" top="24.0" /> </padding> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Découvrir Musique" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Cliquez sur une carte pour écouter la musique" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" onAction="#handleSearch" promptText="Titre, description, genre" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleSearch" text="Rechercher" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleClearSearch" text="Effacer" /> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <Button fx:id="musiqueSectionButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleShowMusiqueSection" text="Musiques" /> <Button fx:id="playlistsSectionButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleShowPlaylistsSection" text="Playlists" /> </HBox> </VBox> </top>
<center> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card music-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="24.0" left="24.0" right="24.0" top="0.0" /> </padding>
<VBox fx:id="musiqueSection" spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Musiques disponibles" /> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" prefHeight="430.0" styleClass="amateur-scroll"> <VBox spacing="12.0"> <TilePane fx:id="musicGrid" hgap="12.0" prefColumns="4" vgap="12.0" /> <Label fx:id="emptyListLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Aucune musique disponible pour le moment." wrapText="true" /> </VBox> </ScrollPane> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="playlistsSection" spacing="10.0" visible="false" managed="false"> <Label text="Mes playlists" />
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <Button fx:id="togglePlaylistFormButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleTogglePlaylistForm" text="Nouvelle playlist" /> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="playlistFormSection" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 12;" visible="false" managed="false"> <Label text="Créer une playlist" /> <TextField fx:id="playlistNameField" promptText="Nom de la playlist" /> <TextArea fx:id="playlistDescriptionArea" prefRowCount="3" promptText="Description (facultative)" wrapText="true" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="playlistImageField" editable="false" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" promptText="Image de couverture" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleChoosePlaylistImage" text="Parcourir" /> </HBox> <Button fx:id="createPlaylistButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleCreatePlaylist" text="Créer la playlist" /> </VBox>
<Label fx:id="playlistFeedbackLabel" wrapText="true" /> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" prefHeight="430.0" styleClass="amateur-scroll"> <content> <TilePane fx:id="playlistGrid" hgap="12.0" prefColumns="3" vgap="12.0" /> </content> </ScrollPane> </VBox> </VBox> </center>
</BorderPane>
